programs.title: Holmes Family Rescue
programs.desc: Homeowners are left financially strapped after a contractor abandoned their basement addition project, leaving them with a hazardous home; Mike, Sherry and Michael must now contend with unmovable bulkheads, unsightly posts and a bumpy floor.

programs.title: Holmes Family Rescue
programs.desc: Homeowners had big plans to build a basement apartment for his aging mom, but a crooked contractor left them with a dangerous mess; Mike, Sherry and Michael step in to help and are shocked to find live wires, sloppy framing and dangerous gas leaks.

programs.title: Holmes Family Rescue
programs.desc: A neighborhood couple renovate their friends' homes, but health issues have now retired their efforts; faced with challenges in their own small bungalow, Mike, Sherry and Michael step in and discover dangerous structural issues.

programs.title: HGTV Smart Home 2026
programs.desc: HGTV Smart Home 2026 is a resort-inspired escape in Orlando, Florida!

programs.title: 100 Day Dream Home
programs.desc: A couple dreams of more space for their two kids and two horses, so they are moving to an equestrian neighborhood with a community stable.

programs.title: 100 Day Dream Home
programs.desc: Although a couple wants to downsize, they still need a home big enough to host their large dance parties; with a unique design style in mind, Brian and Mika look to build them a cultural and sexy house that sweeps them off their feet.
